EmailTemplate.name: ARRH - Present Contract To Candidate
EmailTemplate.subject: Your next rural and remote adventure!
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
YOUR NEXT ADVENTURE AWAITS.
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Did you know we have plenty of contract opportunities available across Australia? Based on your skills and experience, there are role that we think could be a great fit for you!
When you're ready to explore your next adevnture, head over to the Alliance Connect app and click through to the Job Board to apply and we'll guide you through the rest.
Meanwhile, if you have any questions at all you can always call our friendly staff on 07 4998 5550.
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Rural & Remote Health
